company.label: Company Information
company.tip: This data appears in the header of invoices, quotes, and official documents. Make sure it's accurate.

bank.label: Bank Details
bank.tip: Shown in the footer of invoices to make bank transfers easier. Make sure the IBAN is correct.

portal.label: Client Portal
portal.tip: The portal lets clients follow up on their projects and invoices. You can disable it temporarily when needed.

boards.label: Work Boards
boards.tip: Task and project board settings. Controls default templates, notifications, and time tracking.

quotes.label: Quotes
quotes.tip: The prefix and tax rate are applied automatically when a new quote is created.

invoices.label: Invoices & Documents
invoices.tip: These settings control automatic numbering, payment terms, and discounts for all financial documents.

dunning.label: Collections & Reminders
dunning.tip: The collections system sends automatic email reminders for overdue invoices and applies late penalties.

expenses.label: Expenses
expenses.tip: When approval is enabled, new expenses are set to "pending" status until a manager approves them.

commissions.label: Commissions
commissions.tip: Commissions are calculated automatically when a payment is recorded. A custom rate can be set per employee from their profile.

storage.label: Storage
storage.tip: Storage limits protect against excessive usage. The warning threshold shows an alert in the dashboard.

stripe.label: Online Payments
stripe.tip: Get your keys from dashboard.stripe.com. Use test_ keys while testing.

files.label: File Management
files.tip: Versioning, sharing, and trash settings. Affects all files in the system.

security.label: Security
security.tip: Account protection settings — session timeout and failed-attempt lockout. Applied to all users.

email.label: Email
email.tip: SMTP settings for sending notifications and reminders. If left empty, the system uses its default settings.

sales.label: Sales Settings
sales.description: Pipeline stages, tags, and WhatsApp numbers

company_name.label: Company Name
company_name.description: Appears on invoices, quotes, and official documents

company_logo.label: Logo URL
company_logo.description: Direct link to the logo image in PNG or SVG format

quote_prefix.label: Quote Prefix
quote_prefix.description: Appears before the quote number — e.g. QT-0001

quote_expiry_days.label: Quote Validity (days)
quote_expiry_days.description: The default period before a quote expires

vat_rate.label: Tax Rate (%)
vat_rate.description: VAT — applied automatically to invoices and quotes

invoice_prefix.label: Invoice Prefix
invoice_prefix.description: Appears before the invoice number — e.g. INV-0001

payment_terms_days.label: Payment Term (days)
payment_terms_days.description: Used to automatically calculate the due date

default_currency.label: Default Currency
default_currency.description: Supported currencies: AED, USD, EUR, SAR, GBP

default_early_payment_discount_percent.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
default_early_payment_discount_percent.description: Discount granted to the client for paying before the due date

default_early_payment_discount_days.label: Early Payment Days
default_early_payment_discount_days.description: Number of days required to qualify for the discount

credit_note_prefix.label: Credit Note Prefix
credit_note_prefix.description: Appears before the credit note number — e.g. CN-0001

po_prefix.label: Purchase Order Prefix
po_prefix.description: Appears before the purchase order number — e.g. PO-0001

bank_name.label: Bank Name
bank_name.description: Appears in the transfer details on invoices

bank_account_name.label: Account Holder Name
bank_account_name.description: The name registered with the bank

max_upload_size_mb.label: Max Upload Size (MB)
max_upload_size_mb.description: The maximum size for a single file

max_storage_gb.label: Max Storage (GB)
max_storage_gb.description: Total storage space available for all files

kpi_storage_warning_percent.label: Storage Warning Threshold (%)
kpi_storage_warning_percent.description: An alert appears once this percentage of storage is exceeded

portal_enabled.label: Enable Client Portal
portal_enabled.description: When disabled, clients will not be able to log in

portal_welcome_message.label: Welcome Message
portal_welcome_message.description: Shown to the client on the portal's main page

dunning_enabled.label: Enable Collections System
dunning_enabled.description: Automatic email reminders for overdue invoices

late_penalty_grace_days.label: Grace Days
late_penalty_grace_days.description: Grace period after the due date

dunning_reminder_interval_days.label: Interval Between Reminders (days)
dunning_reminder_interval_days.description: The time between each collection reminder

expense_approval_required.label: Expense Approval
expense_approval_required.description: When enabled, new expenses require manager approval

commission_rate.label: Default Commission Rate (%)
commission_rate.description: Used when the employee has no custom rate

commission_trigger.label: Calculation Timing
commission_trigger.description: payment = on payment, invoice = on invoice issue

commission_auto_calculate.label: Auto-Calculate
commission_auto_calculate.description: Calculate commissions automatically when a payment is recorded (manual + Stripe)

stripe_enabled.label: Enable Online Payments
stripe_enabled.description: Enable or disable payments via Stripe

stripe_publishable_key.label: Publishable Key
stripe_publishable_key.description: The public key — starts with pk_live_ or pk_test_

stripe_secret_key.label: Secret Key
stripe_secret_key.description: The secret key — do not share it with anyone

auto_version_on_upload.label: Enable Automatic Versioning
auto_version_on_upload.description: On upload, creates a new version instead of replacing the file

max_versions_per_file.label: Max Versions Per File
max_versions_per_file.description: Older versions are automatically deleted once the limit is exceeded

trash_auto_purge_days.label: Trash Auto-Purge (days)
trash_auto_purge_days.description: Deleted files are permanently removed after this period

allow_public_shares.label: Allow Public Share Links
allow_public_shares.description: When disabled, external share links cannot be created

share_default_expiry_hours.label: Share Link Expiry (hours)
share_default_expiry_hours.description: The default validity period for a share link

board_default_template.label: Default Template
board_default_template.description: The template used when creating a new board

board_auto_create_with_project.label: Auto-Create Board With Project
board_auto_create_with_project.description: When a new project is created, a task board is created automatically

board_require_due_date.label: Require Due Date
board_require_due_date.description: A task cannot be created without a due date

board_enable_time_tracking.label: Enable Time Tracking
board_enable_time_tracking.description: Show estimated and actual hours fields on tasks

board_overdue_notification.label: Overdue Task Notification
board_overdue_notification.description: Send an automatic notification when a task is overdue

board_notify_on_assign.label: Notify on Assignment
board_notify_on_assign.description: Send a notification to the member when assigned to a task

board_notify_on_comment.label: Notify on Comment
board_notify_on_comment.description: Send a notification when a comment is added to a task

board_client_portal_visible.label: Visible to Clients in Portal
board_client_portal_visible.description: Allow clients to view their project boards (read-only)

board_max_attachments_mb.label: Max Task Attachment Size (MB)
board_max_attachments_mb.description: The maximum size for attachments per task

board_done_auto_archive_days.label: Auto-Archive (days)
board_done_auto_archive_days.description: Automatically archive completed tasks after this period (0 = disabled)

session_timeout_minutes.label: Session Timeout (minutes)
session_timeout_minutes.description: Automatic logout after a period of inactivity

max_failed_logins.label: Max Failed Login Attempts
max_failed_logins.description: The account is locked after this number of attempts

lockout_duration_minutes.label: Lockout Duration (minutes)
lockout_duration_minutes.description: How long the account stays locked after exceeding the allowed attempts

smtp_user.label: Username
smtp_user.description: The email address or username used for authentication

smtp_pass.label: Password
smtp_pass.description: The mail password or an App Password

smtp_from.label: From Address
smtp_from.description: The email address shown as the sender of notifications

apiKeys.statusUpdateFailed: Failed to update the key status
apiKeys.permissionRequired: Please select at least one permission
apiKeys.howToUseTitle: How do I use API keys?
apiKeys.howToUseDescription: Create an API key to connect the system with your external systems such as n8n or a Telegram bot. Send the key in the x-api-key header with every request.
apiKeys.keysRegisteredCount: {count, plural, one {# key registered} other {# keys registered}}
apiKeys.noKeysYet: No keys have been created yet
apiKeys.revealedKeyWarning: This key will not be shown again — save it now
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create an API key to integrate with your external systems such as n8n or Telegram
apiKeys.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the key "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

modules.infoText: Every subsystem has its own settings page. Click a card to go there directly.

agentWhatsapp.emptyDescription: Start by linking your first employee to a recipient WhatsApp number — the cron will use this setting as soon as it's activated.
agentWhatsapp.infoTitle: Where does each employee's follow-up reminder go?
agentWhatsapp.infoDescription: Link each team member to an Evolution Instance + a recipient WhatsApp number. The cron reads from here and sends the follow-up reminder to the employee's WhatsApp. One instance can serve multiple employees, each with their own number.

dialog.description: Link the employee to an Evolution Instance and the WhatsApp number that receives reminders.
dialog.agentLockedHint: The employee cannot be changed. To change it, delete the setting and create it again.
dialog.instanceHint: The instance the message is sent from. You can enter a name that hasn't been created yet — validation happens when the cron runs.
dialog.recipientHint: No + or spaces — digits only (including the country code).
dialog.activeHint: Once enabled, the cron will start using this setting immediately.
dialog.recipientPhoneRequired: The recipient WhatsApp number is required
dialog.deleteDescription: Delete the WhatsApp setting for {name}? They will no longer receive follow-up reminders on WhatsApp after deletion (the in-app notification will keep working).
